title: Oud Majestic
description: A majestic blend of warm woody notes, rich spices, and glowing amber. This exquisite fragrance commands attention and leaves an unforgettable trail.

title: Rose Musk
description: A delicate and romantic composition featuring the finest roses intertwined with soft musk and warm vanilla, creating an aura of elegant femininity.

title: Amber Nights
description: An intoxicating nighttime fragrance that captures the mystery of the dark with intense amber, earthy patchouli, and a subtle touch of rare oud.
